nasb.text: Strangers devour his strength, Yet he does not know it; Gray hairs also are sprinkled on him, Yet he does not know it.

esv.text: Strangers devour his strength, and he knows it not; gray hairs are sprinkled upon him, and he knows it not.

cnv.text: 外族人吞吃了他的力量， 他卻不知道； 他頭上滿是白髮， 他也不曉得。

ccb.text: 外族人耗尽了他的力量， 他却茫然不知。 他头发斑白， 却浑然不觉。
